title: The easy fix for F1’s biggest 2026 problem explained
summary: Formula 1 is facing a major problem. Today, we’ll show you what the solution could be. In this video, we explain what super clipping is in Formula 1 in 2026 and why it is one of the biggest issues with the new regulations. We show how drivers suddenly lose speed on the straights due to energy management, how the MGU-K and battery work together, and why this leads to an unnatural driving style and dangerous situations, as seen during the Japanese Grand Prix.
